description: Synthetic candidate lessons from a Hermes-like session. No real user memory, config, credential, path, or transcript is included.

candidates.observed: The user explicitly asked for concise Chinese explanations and concrete steps in durable operating instructions.
candidates.version_scope: Hermes docs verified 2026-07-12; local probe v0.17.0

candidates.observed: This project uses a Starlight docs app under starlight/ and validates article metadata through starlight/src/content.config.ts.
For this article family, the reusable release flow is research pack -> showcase validator -> single article validator -> Starlight build -> diff check -> external review.
A single documentation request returned HTTP 503 during one fetch attempt.
A log line contained token-like text REDACTED_SECRET_TOKEN_SHAPE_32_CHARS.
One tool invocation appeared slower when verbose output was enabled.
